THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, PER PARTIES. CASE SETTLED. DEFENDANT PAID PLAINTIFF BY CHECK PRIOR TO THE HEARING. DEFENDANT WAIVES POS ON SAFEWY IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY HAROLD TICKIN--MANAGER. DEFENDANTS WERE REPRESENTED BY MICHAEL J. HEALY--LOSS PREVENTION INVESTIGATOR. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA C. HO. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
